blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,106 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: overcast, highs of 46°F, gusts to 43 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 25".
